# Track 1 Semantic Review

Evidence: `playlist-map-ko.md`, `track-01-spec.json`, and `track-01-output.md`.

| Criterion | Score | Evidence |
|---|---:|---|
| Design traceability | 2 | All eight Basic Prompt fields compile verbatim from TrackSpec |
| Field routing and output contract | 2 | Three fenced paste-ready fields; title is the only level-three heading and is outside every fence |
| Musical coherence | 2 | Neo-soul harmony, Rhodes-led instrumentation, laid-back groove, intimate vocal, and warm mix reinforce one direction |
| Title, narrative, and hook | 2 | The title phrase returns with a final first-person variation and follows the rainy reading scene |
| Language and singability | 2 | Consistent Korean, compact line lengths, clear vowel flow, and no placeholder or repeat shorthand |
| Structure and lyric completion | 2 | Exact ten-section sequence, 76 bars, 207.3-second plan, 32 lyric lines, and every return written in full |
| Basic versus Absolute Exclusion | 2 | Positive steering and absolute prohibitions are separate with no duplicated trait |
| Playlist fit and differentiation | 2 | Track 1 matches the common contract and its Rhodes/downward-voice-leading signature is distinct in the ten-track map |

Total: **16/16 — draft-validated**

Evidence boundary: no audio render was supplied. Actual runtime, pronunciation, vocal identity, mix behavior, and generator compliance remain unverified until a render is measured and listened to.
